synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2081 Important: Oracle Linux 8 freerdp security update
description:
[2:2.11.7-2]
- Backport several CVE fixes
  Resolves: RHEL-142417, RHEL-142401, RHEL-142385, RHEL-142369, RHEL-142353
  Resolves: RHEL-142337, RHEL-142321
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2081

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2081.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
freerdp-2.11.7-2.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
freerdp-devel-2.11.7-2.el8_10.i686.rpm

freerdp-libs-2.11.7-2.el8_10.i686.rpm
freerdp-libs-2.11.7-2.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-2.el8_10.i686.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-2.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-2.el8_10.i686.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-2.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
freerdp-2.11.7-2.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
freerdp-devel-2.11.7-2.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
freerdp-libs-2.11.7-2.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-2.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-2.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/freerdp-2.11.7-2.el8_10.src.rpm

CVE-2026-23531

CVE-2026-23534

CVE-2026-23884




Description of changes:

[2:2.11.7-2]
- Backport several CVE fixes
  Resolves: RHEL-142417, RHEL-142401, RHEL-142385, RHEL-142369, RHEL-142353
  Resolves: RHEL-142337, RHEL-142321
